name: Blacksmith Goran
greeting: A massive man with burn-scarred arms looks up from his anvil. 'Need something forged? Or just browsing?' He wipes sweat from his brow.

dialogue.response: 'I've swords, axes, and maces — all solid work. Nothing fancy, but they won't break when you need them most. Prices are fair.'
'Ah, that? Old Marta the herbalist left it here as payment for repairs. Potent stuff — brewed it herself from forest roots. Should give quite the boost.'
'Ha! I'm a smith, not a soldier. Talk to Captain Bren at the Guard House if you want lessons. Though the best teacher is a real fight.'
'They broke into my shop two weeks ago. Stole three shortswords. Imagine — goblins with proper steel.' He shakes his head grimly.
